name: Faceless Voiceover + B-Roll
description: Faceless YouTube Shorts / TikTok storytelling format: AI or live narration over stock or AI-generated b-roll. 0-2s curiosity hook → 3-act story (setup → conflict → resolution) with b-roll cuts every 5-8s → punchline + CTA. 45-90s, 9:16, burned-in word-level subtitles mandatory. Anchor format for faceless channels in 2026 — niche grew 300% YoY (Bityclips, Jan 2026), YouTube Shorts is the king platform. No on-camera presence required, evergreen search traffic, low production cost. Niches: history, finance, psychology, tech, true crime, mythology.

stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 (default, calm-narrator) or eleven_v3 (storytelling drama / true-crime). Single TTS pass with stability 0.4-0.5, similarity_boost 0.75, style 0.15-0.30 depending on tone. Language follows the brief.
stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter for AI-generated b-roll keyframes (1 keyframe per b-roll cut, 6-14 total). Static stock footage is an alternate path — when used, this stage is skipped.
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter for short b-roll motion clips (5s default; 3s for fast cuts). generate_audio: false. One i2v call per keyframe. Mix freely with stock for hybrid b-roll.
stackSummary.captions: ElevenLabs Scribe v1 transcribes the rendered VO to word-level timestamps. Burn-in via Remotion HormoziCaptions (default), KaraokeCaptions (story-pacing), or MinimalCaptions (minimal). Mandatory — 85% watch muted.
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — single ambient/cinematic underscore at low volume, ducked under VO via `ralphy audio sidechain` to roughly -12dB. No vocals, no melody hooks that compete with narration.

constants.structure: 0-2s curiosity hook → 2-15s setup → 15-40s conflict → 40-55s resolution → 55-60s payoff + CTA (scales linearly to 90s)

variationAxes: niche (history / finance / psychology / tech / true-crime / mythology / science-trivia)
b-roll source (AI-generated only / stock only / hybrid)
VO model (eleven_multilingual_v2 default / eleven_v3 for storytelling drama)
VO language (any — English, Russian, Spanish, etc.)
doNotCopyLiterally: Specific facts, hook claims, VO text, exact b-roll prompts. Vibe reference only. Verify any claim before using as a hook — wrong facts torch retention.
referenceNotes: No reference required by default — most faceless storytelling avoids named real entities. If the brief names a real person, brand, or specific real entity (e.g. 'the story of Steve Jobs', 'why Apple lost the watch market'), the reference-required gate (AGENTS.md hard rule #3) re-engages and a reference must be supplied.
